name: code-evolve
description: Self-evolving project builder powered by Claude Code
author: FRANK BRIA <frank@frankbria.com>

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/cli.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!')){fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);}" && chmod +x dist/cli.js
